changes.comment: Migrate internal query methods off the deprecated ECSqlStatement/withPreparedStatement API to the modern ECSqlReader (withQueryReader/createQueryReader). This includes IModelDb (queryEntityIds, querySchemaVersion, queryChildren, queryParent, hasSubModel, queryLastModifiedTime, _queryAspects, _queryAspect, getAspect, runInstanceQuery, Elements.getAspects), IModelReadRpcImpl.getAllCodeSpecs, ExternalSourceAspect.findAllBySource, Relationships.tryGetInstanceProps, ModelSelector/CategorySelector.deserialize, ViewStore.querySelectorValues, ElementTreeWalker helpers, ElementDrivesTextAnnotation.updateFieldDependencies, the annotations field-value helper, ChangeSummaryManager, ChangesetECAdaptor's instanceOf check, and ChannelControl.getChannelKey/queryChannelRoot.
